reviews.comment:
Es la estación de servicio de mi vida. Desde los 6 años recorro la ruta 8 y recuerdo ir con mi abuelo y hacer escala inevitable para tomar una chocolatada y un especial de jamón y queso, luego repetir con mis viejos, luego solo y ahora con mi familia. Por muchos especiales de jamón y queso mas!

(Translated by Google)
It's the gas station of my life. I've been traveling Route 8 since I was 6 years old, and I remember going with my grandfather and making the inevitable stop for hot chocolate and a ham and cheese special, then repeating it with my parents, then alone, and now with my family. Here's to many more ham and cheese specials!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdC1hdHBRRRAB

reviews.comment:

I go out of necessity. The ACA should change stations. The service is generally poor, they waste your time.
